description_long: This bungalow features a broad, flat roof with clean, modern lines and a prominent rectangular overhang. The exterior walls are finished in a mix of dark and light tones, with a combination of smooth and textured surfaces. The front facade includes a recessed entryway and a sheltered area beneath the roof, with a checkered pattern visible on the ground. Large, uninterrupted wall sections suggest minimal window openings, contributing to a private and contemporary aesthetic. The structure sits low to the ground, emphasizing its single-story design. The overall appearance is sleek and geometric, with a focus on horizontal planes and subtle color contrasts.
description: A modern, single-story bungalow with a flat roof, geometric lines, and a mix of dark and light exterior finishes. The design is sleek, private, and emphasizes horizontal planes.
description_view_0: Front view showing the recessed entryway, sheltered area, and checkered ground pattern beneath the overhang.
description_view_1: Side view highlighting the solid wall sections and the extended flat roof with minimal openings.
description_view_2: Rear view with dark wall surfaces and a continuation of the flat roof, showing little to no window presence.
description_view_3: Opposite side view displaying the checkered ground pattern and the interplay of light and dark wall panels.
attribute_window_arrangement: minimal windows, mostly solid wall sections
